# AMI Center — Server-Side Patterns

## When to Activate

Activate when writing server-side AMI Center code involving:
- Table operations, triggers, timers, stored procedures
- Server-side indexes and constraints
- Deferred execution and external datasource calls
- Designing shared live state or choosing between datamodels and realtime tables
- Setting up Center-hosted tables with persistence requirements

---

## Knowledge

Full patterns, examples, and pitfalls: call `aidoc_getDocumentation("center")` on the live instance.
